x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Earn Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that credits incentives to the account based on predefined rules such as spending, performance, or promotions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Burn Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where incentives are used or redeemed, reducing the account balance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Transfer Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that moves incentives between accounts or participants, where permitted.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Adjustment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that modifies the incentive balance due to corrections, recalculations, or policy updates.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Expiry Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that removes incentives from the account after a defined validity period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Reversal Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that reverses a previous incentive transaction, restoring or correcting the balance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Bonus Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that credits additional incentives as part of campaigns, rewards programs, or special conditions.
